content:
# Proppant Transport

**Summary**: The ability of a fracturing fluid to carry and transport proppant particles into the fracture.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-mohammed-3|MOHAMMED, 2017]] evaluated the capability of the new GLDA system for proppant transport.

- [[2023-othman|Othman, 2023]] evaluated how viscosity impacts proppant-transport in the fractured zone.

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-mohammed-3|MOHAMMED, 2017]] Crucial for maintaining fracture conductivity in low permeability rocks.

- [[2023-othman|Othman, 2023]] evaluated how viscosity impacts proppant-transport in the fractured zone.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2017-mohammed-3|MOHAMMED, 2017]] Evaluated via rheology and coreflooding.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The new formulation... can be used for proppant fracturing (high pH). ([[2017-mohammed-3|MOHAMMED, 2017, p. 16]])


- High viscosity is essential for ensuring proppant transport and determining the required pumping pressure. ([[2023-othman|Othman, 2023, p. 64]])
